ReqMaster.system_instructions:
You are a Requisition Master agent handling job intake and requirements analysis.

Your responsibilities:
1. Retrieve and validate job posting details
2. Extract structured requirements (must-have vs nice-to-have)
3. Verify job is approved and open for sourcing
4. Identify hiring manager and team context
5. Set up screening criteria for candidate matching

When processing job requisitions:
- Validate the job ID exists and is in 'open' status
- Extract all required and preferred skills
- Note salary range and location requirements
- Identify urgency level and time-to-fill targets
- Flag any special requirements (clearance, certifications)

IMPORTANT - Output Keywords:
- If the position is time-sensitive or high priority, include the word "urgent" in your analysis
- If the role requires international hiring or global compliance, include "international" in your response
- Always clearly state the priority level (high/medium/low)

Output format: Provide structured job requirements ready for candidate sourcing.

tool_definitions.name: get_job_details
tool_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a job posting including title, department, requirements, salary range, and hiring manager.

job_id.description: The job ID to retrieve (e.g., JOB-SWE-2025-001)
job_id.title: Job Id

tool_definitions.name: extract_requirements
tool_definitions.description: Extracts and structures the requirements from a job posting, separating must-have from nice-to-have skills.

job_id.description: The job ID to extract requirements from
job_id.title: Job Id

TalentScout.system_instructions:
You are a Talent Scout agent specializing in external candidate sourcing.

Your responsibilities:
1. Search LinkedIn for candidate profiles matching job requirements
2. Query external job boards for applicants (Indeed, LinkedIn Jobs, Glassdoor, etc.)
3. Screen candidates against job requirements
4. Filter based on experience, skills, and location
5. Handle visa sponsorship considerations

When processing external candidates:
- Verify all required skills are present
- Note any visa sponsorship requirements
- Check salary expectations against job budget
- Flag candidates with relevant industry experience
- Prioritize candidates with shorter notice periods

Output Keywords:
- When you find enough qualified candidates, explicitly state "sufficient candidates found"
- If the candidate pool is limited or insufficient, state "insufficient candidates"
- Always indicate the number of candidates found

Output format: Provide structured candidate profiles with skills match analysis.

Find all candidates for the Senior Software Engineer position (JOB-SWE-2025-001). Include external applicants, internal transfers, referrals, and agency candidates.

parts.response:
Structured Requirements for JOB-SWE-2025-001 (Senior Software Engineer):

MUST HAVE:
Python, Azure, 5+ years experience, Distributed systems

NICE TO HAVE:
Kubernetes, CS degree

Minimum Salary: $150,000
Location Requirement: Seattle, WA (Remote OK)

parts.content:
Structured Job Requirements: Senior Software Engineer (JOB-SWE-2025-001)

Status: Unable to validate job approval and open status due to system error—manual confirmation advised before proceeding.

Extracted Requirements:

Must-Have Skills:
- Python
- Azure
- 5+ years experience
- Distributed systems

Nice-to-Have Skills:
- Kubernetes
- Computer Science degree

Salary Range:
- Minimum: $150,000

Location:
- Seattle, WA (Remote OK)

Other Notes:
- No special requirements (e.g., clearance, certifications) detected from extract
- Priority level: Not specified (cannot confirm "urgent" or standard status without job details)
- For candidate sourcing: Include external applicants, internal transfers, referrals, and agency candidates

Action Required: Please confirm the requisition is open and approved for sourcing before proceeding to shortlist candidates. If urgent or international requirements apply, specify for sourcing.

parts.content:
External Candidate Sourcing Results — Senior Software Engineer (JOB-SWE-2025-001)

Number of Qualified External Candidates: 4

Sourcing Channels: LinkedIn (2), Job Boards (2)

Structured Candidate Profiles & Skills Match:

1. Alex Thompson (LinkedIn)
   - Location: Seattle, WA
   - Experience: 8 years, Senior Software Engineer at TechGiant
   - Skills: Python, Azure, Kubernetes, Distributed Systems, Go
   - Degree: MS Computer Science, University of Washington
   - Visa Requirement: Not specified (presumed none, domestic profile)
   - Salary Expectation: Not specified
   - Open to Work: Yes
   - Skills Match: Full (all must-have and nice-to-have, CS degree, Kubernetes)
   - Notice Period: Not specified
   - Industry Experience: Tech major

2. Robert Chen (LinkedIn)
   - Location: Seattle, WA
   - Experience: 6 years, Senior Backend Developer
   - Skills: Python, Java, Azure, Microservices, Distributed Systems
   - Degree: BS Computer Engineering, Carnegie Mellon
   - Visa Requirement: Not specified (presumed none)
   - Salary Expectation: Not specified
   - Open to Work: Yes
   - Skills Match: Meets all must-have, does not have CS degree or Kubernetes
   - Notice Period: Not specified

3. John Chen (Indeed Application)
   - Location: Seattle, WA
   - Experience: 7 years, Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp Inc
   - Skills: Python, Azure, Kubernetes, Distributed Systems, Go
   - Degree: MS Computer Science, Stanford
   - Visa Requirement: No
   - Salary Expectation: $180,000 (within target market for Seattle Sr. Eng., higher end of budget)
   - Skills Match: Full (all must-have and nice-to-have, CS degree, Kubernetes)
   - Notice Period: Not specified
   - Industry Experience: Cloud platform company

4. James Park (ZipRecruiter Application)
   - Location: Seattle, WA
   - Experience: 6 years, Senior Developer at CloudServices LLC
   - Skills: Python, Azure, Distributed Systems, C++
   - Degree: MS Computer Science, Carnegie Mellon
   - Visa Requirement: Yes (H1B sponsorship required)
   - Salary Expectation: $175,000 (within budget)
   - Skills Match: Meets all must-have, no Kubernetes
   - Notice Period: Not specified
   - Industry Experience: Cloud services

Status: “sufficient candidates found” for external sourcing (4 candidates). All candidates meet must-have requirements and location, and are within market salary range.

Next Steps:
- Referrals, internal transfers, and agency candidate checks pending. Please provide access or shortlist for those sources if required.
- Notice periods, current compensation, and deeper screening (for cultural fit, interview readiness, direct client-industry experience) recommended prior to submission.

Let me know if you want a deeper dive or internal/referral/agency candidate search.
